weather_report:
Subiaco wakes to a clean, brilliant blue, the kind of morning where shadows are sharp and the light has a confident stride. Skies are set to stay clear through late morning and into the early afternoon, so sunshine will be generous and unfiltered; expect the UV to surge to very high levels around midday under this spotless dome. The air looks honest and dry, lending the day a clear-edged clarity that makes colors pop and thoughts feel tidy.

It’s a pleasant morning if you keep the sun on a short leash. Dress in light, breathable layers, add a brimmed hat and good sunglasses, and make sunscreen non-negotiable. A short walk to fetch a coffee or a loop through your neighborhood before lunch will feel easy; errands are best ticked off before the sun turns stern. Open the windows to air the house, hang the washing while the light is keen, or settle on a shaded balcony with a book. If you’re heading out later, carry water and linger in patches of shade; the afternoon will stay bright and uncomplicated.
